source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in <image>, the current splits at point \( a \) and passes through a symmetric circular loop, merging again at point \( b \). If both \( ca \) and \( bd \) are along the radial direction of the loop, then the magnetic induction at the center of the loop is:

choice_map.A: Perpendicular to the plane of the loop and directed into the page.
choice_map.B: Perpendicular to the plane of the loop and directed out of the page.
choice_map.C: In the plane of the loop and directed toward \( b \).
choice_map.D: In the plane of the loop and directed toward \( a \).
